CS350.raw: Prereq: CS 240/240E, 241/241E, 246/246E, (CS 251/251E or ECE 222); Honours Computer Science, Honours Data Science (BCS), BCFM, BSE students only. Antireq: ECE 254, 350, MTE 241, SE 350

CS341.raw: Prereq: CS 240 or 240E; One of CS 245, 245E, SE 212; MATH 239 or MATH 249; One of STAT 206, STAT 230, STAT 240; Honours Computer Science, Honours Data Science (BCS, BMath), BCFM, BSE students only. Antireq: CS 231, ECE 406

CS136L.raw: Prereq: One of CS 145, at least 90% in CS 115, at least 70% in CS 116, at least 60% in CS 135. Coreq: CS 136 or CS 146

CS245E.raw: Prereq: A grade of 85% or higher in one of CS 136 or 146; Honours Mathematics students only. Antireq: CS 245, ECE 208, PMATH 330, and SE 212

MATH145.raw: Prereq: 4U Calculus and Vectors or 4U Mathematics of Data Management; Honours Mathematics students only. Antireq: MATH 135

STAT240.raw: Prereq: ((MATH 137 or 147) with a grade of at least 80%) or (MATH 138 or 148); Honours Mathematics students only. Antireq: STAT 220, 230

MATH148.raw: Prereq: MATH 147; Honours Mathematics students only. Antireq: MATH 118, 119, 128, 138

STAT241.raw: Prereq: MATH 138/148 & STAT 230/240; Hon Math only. Antireq: STAT 221,231.

MATH146.raw: Prereq: MATH 145; Honours Mathematics students only.  Antireq: MATH 106, 114, 115, 136, NE 112

CS146.raw: Prereq: CS 145 with a grade of at least 75%. Coreq: CS 136L. Antireq: CS 116, 136, 137, 138.

MATH147.raw: Prereq:  4U Calculus and Vectors; Honours Mathematics students only.  Antireq: MATH 116, 117, 124, 127, 137

MATH249.raw: Prereq: (MATH 135 with minimum grade of 80% or MATH 145) and (MATH 136 or 146); Honours Mathematics students only. Antireq: CO 220, MATH 229, 239

CS241E.raw: Prereq: (CS 136L and a grade of 85% or higher in one of CS 136 or CS 146), or a grade of 85% or higher in CS 138; Honours Computer Science, Honours Data Science (BCS, BMath), BCFM, BSE students only. Antireq: CS 230, ECE 351

CS251E.raw: Prereq: A grade of  85% or higher in one of CS 136 or 146; Honours Computer Science, Honours Data Science (BCS, BMath), BCFM, BSE students only. Antireq: BME 292/393, CS 251, ECE 222, ME 262, MTE 262, SYDE 192

CS240E.raw: Prereq: A grade of 85% or higher in one of CS 136, 138 or 146; Honours Computer Science, Honours Data Science (BCS, BMath), BCFM, BSE students only. Coreq: One of STAT 206, 230, 240. Antireq: CS 234, CS 240, ECE 250

CS246E.raw: Prereq: CS 136L, a grade of 85% in either CS 136 or CS 146; Honours Mathematics students only. Antireq: CS 246, SYDE 322

CS499T.raw: Prereq: Honours Computer Science, Honours Data Science (BCS), BCFM, BSE students only
